steps.title: Spot what needs illustrating
steps.content: The passage says the authors describe how restorative sleep can be for young people. Any quotation must directly show sleep's restorative power, particularly for young people or children.

steps.title: Match the restorative quality to the choices
steps.content: Choice C portrays sleep as deeply healing and rejuvenating: “Blessed are the slumbers of the innocent! They are kindlier than balm, and they refresh and gladden the spirit of childhood.” The other three address the narrative's humble character, home's emotional significance, and past injustices—none of which illustrate sleep's restorative effect. That matches choice C — C is correct.
